SPAWN 50 12
NPC 49 9 Halt! State your business at the gates of Blancogov. No entry without authorisation!
NPC 49 72 The great temple of King Eldar lies at the road's end. The council has been summoned — something stirs.
DOOR 49 98 blancogov_temple door_temple_exit
DOOR 50 4 __exit__ blancogov_exit
SCROLL 42 50 scroll_farsyth_lineage
SCROLL 58 50 scroll_blancogov_founding
